# THE SIGNAL
> A public, self-grading oracle that makes dated, falsifiable tech predictions every day and keeps score in the open. Rules-based, no LLM.

## Pages
- Homepage: https://mattbusel.github.io/tech-oracle/
- The receipts (dated calls, graded): https://mattbusel.github.io/tech-oracle/receipts.html
- The arena (bet against the machine): https://mattbusel.github.io/tech-oracle/arena.html
- Sleep mode (the oracle dreams, always running): https://mattbusel.github.io/tech-oracle/sleep.html
- The bloodline (the breeding population of strategies): https://mattbusel.github.io/tech-oracle/bloodline.html
- Open dataset: https://mattbusel.github.io/tech-oracle/dataset/
- Today's call (plain text): https://mattbusel.github.io/tech-oracle/cli
- RSS feed: https://mattbusel.github.io/tech-oracle/feed.xml
- Sitemap: https://mattbusel.github.io/tech-oracle/sitemap.xml
- Latest call: https://mattbusel.github.io/tech-oracle/call/34.html

## API for agents
Static JSON, read-only, CORS-open. No key, no signup.
- Discovery: https://mattbusel.github.io/tech-oracle/api/oracle.json
- Today's calls: https://mattbusel.github.io/tech-oracle/api/today.json
- Full record + calibration: https://mattbusel.github.io/tech-oracle/api/record.json
- Observatory (sectors, fear/greed, chasm watch): https://mattbusel.github.io/tech-oracle/api/observatory.json
- OpenAPI: https://mattbusel.github.io/tech-oracle/openapi.json
- Agent manifest: https://mattbusel.github.io/tech-oracle/.well-known/ai-plugin.json
- MCP resources: https://mattbusel.github.io/tech-oracle/.well-known/mcp.json
Agents can place stateless bets; see the how_to_bet field in oracle.json.

## How it works
Reads ten public sources from technical to general: arXiv, GitHub, crates.io, Lobsters, Hacker News, dev.to, Reddit, Ars Technica, Google News and Wikipedia pageviews. It keeps a growing daily corpus, tracks each term's velocity and diffusion down the funnel (a CHASM bet fires when a term leaves the dev bubble for the general public), grades its own calibration (Brier score) and reweights its sources by realized hit rate. Each call carries a concrete win condition and is settled HIT or MISS against later signals. Current record: 8-2. Tech Acceleration Index today: 71 (SURGING).
